title: Generating a specific persona-based copy
scenario: Create a marketing copy for a new product targeting young adults aged 18-24. The copy should include a clear and concise description of the product, its benefits, and a call-to-action. The prompt should be under 150 words.
constraints: Must use a tone that resonates with the target audience
Must include a clear and concise description of the product

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone is consistent with the target audience.
Check if the copy accurately describes the product and its benefits.
Check if the prompt is adhered to and is under 150 words.
Check if the copy is well-written, concise, and engaging.
